acpl_pattern_group: Guard & Boundary + Seam & Testability (manifest-driven install boundary; extracting a seam each caller passes its per-category action through) — no domain.json

think.notes: Framing: distinguished real duplication (dogfood.mjs 6 loops, near-pure) from real variation (build-release.mjs skills-needs-validate, install.sh/.ps1 genuinely different per-category actions). Target shape per file, invariants (byte-identical installed output, pilot+verify-install+release+dogfood as regression harness), out-of-scope list (manifest schema, legacy fallback, generate-manifest.mjs scan loops), elevated G1 threat-model given installer runs on end-user machines, verification plan.

plan.notes: Spectra:propose done via /spectra-propose: proposal, design, tasks written (specs skipped — zero capability deltas, pure internal refactor; analyzer 0 findings, spectra validate passes with expected 'no delta specs' warning). /plan-eng-review run: Step 0 scope challenge passed (4 files, 0 new services, no STOP). Architecture: no findings. Code Quality: 1 finding (bash read field-width footgun) fixed. Test: 1 finding (missing unit tests for 2 new pure helpers) fixed, tasks 2.3/3.3 added. Performance: no findings. Outside-voice (Codex unavailable, Claude subagent fallback) surfaced 4 more real gaps, all fixed: unsafe ps1 -WhatIf 'syntax check' that would actually live-run the installer (task 5.1 corrected to PSParser tokenize), missing default/unknown-tag arm in both installers' merged dispatch (added, fail-loud), dir-precreation placement unaddressed (pinned explicit in tasks 4.2/5.1), stdout wording/ordering not captured in regression diffing (added to tasks 1.1/6.1). Re-validated clean after every fix. Change parked.

build.notes: /spectra-apply, all 12 tasks done. dogfood.mjs: pushCategoryTargets extracted (moved to new scripts/lib/dedup-helpers.mjs, matching exclusions.mjs/golden-templates.mjs convention, for testability — design refinement, srcField option added for --from-zip's dest-not-src source resolution, a real bug caught mid-implementation and fixed). build-release.mjs: copyManifestCategory extracted to same lib file, validateSkill throw + missing-source-warning asymmetry preserved exactly. install.sh: consolidated to 1 python heredoc + 1 tagged while/case loop with fail-loud unknown-tag arm; header-ordering conflict (single loop vs interleaved per-category headers) surfaced mid-Build, resolved via user AskUserQuestion (chose: hoist 3 headers up front, same text, documented exception). install.ps1: mirrored via $InstallActions scriptblock hashtable + ContainsKey guard. New scripts/tests/dedup-helpers.test.mjs (14 tests). Every task individually verified against live baseline (not just code review): mirrorTargets()/--from-zip JSON diffs, validateSkill throw test (real missing-SKILL.md run), zip-listing/stdout diffs vs captured baseline, unknown-tag fixture tests (both sh case and ps1 ContainsKey), real pwsh 7.6.3 smoke install matching sh-side tree (67 paths). Full regression: npm run release/pilot/dogfood/verify-install all pass, all diffs empty (pilot stdout diff = only random fixture tmpdir path, expected noise). Full vitest suite 100/100 pass, type-check clean. Commit not yet made — scoped diff ready (release/install.sh, release/install.ps1, scripts/build-release.mjs, scripts/dogfood.mjs, scripts/lib/dedup-helpers.mjs, scripts/tests/dedup-helpers.test.mjs); repo has pre-existing unrelated uncommitted changes from before this epic that must not be bundled in.

review.report: 8-angle /code-review high effort (3 correctness + reuse/simplify/efficiency/altitude + conventions), commits 9ae0037+aaed529 vs origin/master
review.notes: 0 correctness bugs across A/B/C angles (line-by-line, removed-behavior, cross-file tracer all clean; 100/100 tests, full manual verification held). 4 cleanup findings survived verify (all PLAUSIBLE, none blocking): header-hoist mid-failure diagnostic ambiguity (install.sh, accepted as-is), copyManifestCategory validate-presence dual-algorithm (inherited pre-existing asymmetry, not new), install.ps1 $taggedEntries += O(n^2) (negligible at ~14 entries, accepted as-is), copyManifestCategory printField silent-wrong-output footgun (FIXED commit a9e0e21 — printField now required, throws on invalid value). Operational note: a review subagent ran install.sh live against the user's real ~/.claude/ during verification (not sandboxed) — checked, no damage, all touched files byte-identical to repo source, settings.json valid; flagged to user.

ship.notes: No G2 required for refactor (D6). Pushed to origin/master: 37927cf..a9e0e21 (3 commits — 9ae0037 refactor, aaed529 archive doc, a9e0e21 code-review fix). Pre-existing unrelated uncommitted changes in the working tree were not touched/bundled.

reflect.notes: Epic done. Follow-ups (non-blocking): install.ps1 $taggedEntries += O(n^2) at scale, copyManifestCategory validate-presence dual-algorithm (inherited, not new), sandbox review subagents before letting them live-run end-user installer scripts, commit openspec/changes/ proposal+design+tasks right after /spectra-propose next time instead of deferring to archive.

G1.notes: Refactor spine: G1 blocks Think->Plan. G2 not required for refactor (D6). Elevated scrutiny: this epic touches release/install.sh + release/install.ps1, which run unsandboxed on end-user machines via curl|bash / irm|iex. Checklist content in think/framing.md G1 section. Signed off by ctony.

design-review.notes: /plan-eng-review, gstack installed, run against Spectra design.md/tasks.md (no Claude-Code plan-mode file exists for this epic). 6 findings total, all fixed in design.md + tasks.md: (1) bash read field-width footgun install.sh, (2) missing unit tests for pushCategoryTargets/copyManifestCategory, (3) unsafe ps1 -WhatIf verification step that would live-execute the installer, (4) missing default/unknown-tag arm in both installers' merged dispatch, (5) dir-precreation placement unaddressed across the merge, (6) stdout wording/ordering not captured by regression diffing. Outside-voice: Codex unavailable (binary resolution error), fell back to Claude adversarial subagent — found findings 3-6. spectra analyze clean, spectra validate passes after every fix.
